title: DNA Extraction from Arabidopsis thaliana
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"jgds","text":"This is a protocol for extract DNA from arabidopsis thialiana. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 400 mL DNA extraction solution into 1.5 mL centrifuge tube.
Grind 3 small leaves or 1 large leaf with a grinding stick in the centrifuge tube with the extract.
Shake the oscillator for 00:00:05 , and place it at room temperature until other preparations are completed.
Centrifuge at 16 000 rpm for 2 minutes at room temperature.
Transfer 200 mL of centrifuged supernatant into a clean centrifuge tube.
Add 200 mL isopropanol, mix well and place at room temperature for 3 minutes.
Centrifuge at 16 000 rpm at room temperature for 5 minutes, remove the supernatant, wash the precipitate with 70% ethanol, and dry the precipitate at room temperature.
Dissolve DNA in 100 mL deionized water and store it in a refrigerator at – 20 ° C.
creator: Lily Li
